reviews.comment:
Con mi marido somos socios. Pasamos a verificar agua y aceite. No nos atendian y mi marido tuvo que buscar a alguien que nos atendiera. 9.40hs llegamos 10hs nos fuimos tenemos una nena de año llorando en el auto y la persona que nos atendio charlaba con un muchacho sobre comprarse un auto. Falta de respeto y empatia y encima no nos hizo el descuento correspondiente por ser socios. Nos correspondía 10 % y solo nos hicieron el 5%

(Translated by Google)
My husband and I are members. We went to get our water and oil checked. They wouldn't help us, and my husband had to find someone to assist us. We arrived at 9:40 a.m. and left at 10:00 a.m. We have a one-year-old daughter crying in the car, and the person who helped us was chatting with a young man about buying a car. It was disrespectful and lacked empathy, and on top of that, they didn't give us the discount we were entitled to as members. We were entitled to 10%, but they only gave us 5%.

reviewReply.comment:
Hola Evelyn. Nos interesaría tener más detalles de este caso.
Te dejo mi teléfono por si gustas  comunicarte. 
2234068693 Daniel.
